stimulus.content: A student is looking at a map that shows parks, schools, and hospitals in a neighborhood. Small symbols are used for each type of building. An arrow on the map points to the top of the page.

stem: Which TWO map elements would help the student understand the symbols and directions on this map?

choices.text: A legend that explains what each symbol means
A compass rose that shows north, south, east, and west
A title that names the type of government
A graph that shows the population over time

answer_explanation: A legend (or key) explains what each symbol on the map represents. A compass rose shows cardinal directions so the reader can tell which way is north, south, east, and west.
